name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: First Lady Melania Trump announces 2018 White House Christmas theme
body:
Yesterday, First Lady Melania Trump unveiled the 2018 Christmas decorations at the White House.

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ae4aab67e&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • November 27, 2018

** Christmas at the White House
------------------------------------------------------------
Yesterday, First Lady Melania Trump unveiled the 2018 Christmas decorations at the White House. This year’s theme, fittingly called “American Treasures,” brings a spirit of patriotism to the holiday by honoring the unique heritage of our Nation.

“This is a joyous time of year when we decorate the White House for the Christmas Season,” the First Lady said. “Thank you to the many volunteers and staff who worked hard to decorate the halls of the People’s House in Christmas cheer. On behalf of my family, we wish everyone a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.”

The White House will host more than 100 open houses, many receptions, and more than 30,000 people on public tours this holiday season.

This morning, the First Lady joined Second Lady Karen Pence to kick off the “season of giving” by volunteering their time at the American Red Cross in Washington, D.C. Joined by spouses of both Cabinet officials and military service members, they assembled care packages for American troops currently stationed abroad.

Watch the First Lady unveil the 2018 White House Christmas decorations. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3493ffac48&e=3ee4985eea)

The story: Behind this year’s Christmas theme, “American Treasures” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c62d70cdf2&e=3ee4985eea)

** Criminal justice reform, Texas style
------------------------------------------------------------
In Mississippi yesterday, President Trump explained his support for the FIRST STEP Act, a bill that will bring much-needed reform to America’s prison system.

“I think we all want the same thing,” the President said. “We want safer communities. We want people to have better opportunities and a better life.” The legislation, which is drawing strong bipartisan support, would enact reasonable sentencing reforms to ensure fairness while keeping the most dangerous criminals off the street. “Tough on crime but also smart on crime,” President Trump calls it.

“A lot of great places” have done criminal justice reform at the state level, he added, including Texas, Kentucky, and Georgia. “You know, you think of Texas as a tough law-and-order state, and they’ve done it . . . and in Georgia, where the Governor has been speaking about it like it’s almost a miracle.”

Kushner and Philipson: How to fix an expensive, ineffective system (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74ded325ec&e=3ee4985eea)

Watch: President Trump’s Mississippi roundtable on the FIRST STEP Act (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0232d5af1b&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
First Lady Melania Trump helps volunteers assemble military comfort kits for deployed American troops at the American Red Cross Headquarters in Washington, D.C. | November 27, 2018

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3a1a978d01&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c102fd985&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4aebd6c4ba)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: DHS: 110 Percent Surge in Migrant Men Using Kids to Enter US, 'Rampant Fraud'
body:
"Educated on a legal loophole that lets migrant ‘families’ with kids enter the United States, the Homeland Security Department reported Tuesday..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e05d1f396&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# DHS: 110 Percent Surge in Migrant Men Using Kids to Enter US, 'Rampant Fraud'

“Educated on a legal loophole that lets migrant ‘families’ with kids enter the United States, the Homeland Security Department reported Tuesday that men showing up with kids at the border has spiked 110 percent in just the last two years,” Paul Bedard reports in the _Washington Examiner_.

“The department noted that children could be used by smugglers and drug traffickers to enter the country. Families are also using fraud to game the immigration system. The department said that 170 families have been caught lying about their relationships to enter the U.S.”

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=271abb563e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The mainstream media and Democrats have criticized the Trump administration’s response to the migrant caravans storming the nation’s southern border. However, many of the critiques either don’t provide full context or are factually incorrect,” Fred Lucas writes in _[The Daily Signal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=201cc1faa1&e=3ee4985eea)_. Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen explained that historically, less than 10 percent of those claiming asylum from Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador are found eligible. “Most of these migrants are seeking jobs or to join family who are already in the U.S.”
---
|
---
| In the _[Idaho Statesman](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c6e2ec222&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Cynthia Sewell writes that students at Wilder Elementary School were greeted yesterday by two special guests: Apple CEO Tim Cook and Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump. The two guests “embarked on a nearly hourlong tour of the school, visiting classrooms and watching students demonstrate their technological skills on the handheld devices Apple provided the school district nearly three years ago,” Sewell reports.
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration on Wednesday announced new sanctions against the vice president of Nicaragua and a top national security adviser to President Daniel Ortega. The sanctions were imposed through an executive order signed by President Trump Tuesday and follow similar escalations against officials from Cuba and Venezuela,” Rafael Bernal reports for _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d145040e8d&e=3ee4985eea)_. “This Administration is committed to holding the Ortega regime accountable for the violent protests and widespread corruption that have led to the deaths of hundreds of innocent Nicaraguans and destroyed their economy,” Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=411ffcfb52&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=55b182020a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=beb8bba121)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: #Amazing
body:
Peter,
I’ll say it simply...you are #Amazing!
That’s the word I use to describe those who are taking a stand to do incredible and life-changing things in our nation. Yes, life-changing. Because when you stand for life, when you help protect each person’s right to fully live out and share their faith in the public square, and when you fight for the liberty of each person to fully live out their God-given potential – well, you’re amazing!
That is what we’re about at My Faith Votes, and I’m amazed at all that we’ve been able to accomplish, because of you. I want to thank each one of you for what you have done to stand with us through your prayers and financial support.
And I’m particularly amazed at what so many of you helped accomplish yesterday. Thank you to each of you who prayed and donated on #GivingTuesday and helped us exceed our $20,000 goal! And even more amazing is that your funds were matched dollar for dollar, doubling your impact!
Our team is already working hard on exciting plans for 2019 and 2020 to equip and mobilize even more Christians to let their faith shape the future of our nation.
Thank you for being part of making a difference in our communities and our country. It’s an honor to stand with you.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127com01&n=1)
P.S. If you don’t already receive the weekly Intersect email where we THINK, PRAY and ACT at the Intersection of faith and politics – I highly encourage you to [sign-up to receive it](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iTtMewf2DL0D-tj3igeTtq7tAOBodbghxqmdk2E87nqK3-UmTAu-YKwjFgj_tjDEQQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127com01&n=2)!
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127com01&n=3).

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Blueprint
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | The 2018 campaign was never going to be an easy race. In 2016, Trump won Ohio by a wide margin. As 2018 rolled on, polling showed my opponent closing the gap. Special interests wanted me gone. My opponent launched some awful, nasty, personal attacks against me and my family. You know how we overcame all that? _With messages like this one._ The grassroots strength that carried us to victory in the 2018 election started way back in November of 2013, [**when I sent a message after the 2012 race, asking supporters like you to chip in a few bucks.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd81/4462dc26/8ac84700/201f0dbf/4250117015/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181128?refcode=sbe181128_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Month after month, quarter after quarter, year after year, we hit critical fundraising goals. We grew our team from a few thousand supporters to a powerful grassroots movement of hundreds of thousands. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd81/4462dc26/8ac84700/201f0dbe/4250117015/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181128?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181128_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd81/4462dc26/8ac84700/201f0dbe/4250117015/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181128?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181128_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd81/4462dc26/8ac84700/201f0dbe/4250117015/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181128?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181128_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd81/4462dc26/8ac84700/201f0dbf/4250117015/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181128?refcode=sbe181128_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Here's why that happened: **First, because our values resonate with people.** When you fight for the workers who built this country, people take notice. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, collect tips or collect a salary, I believe our country should reward hard work -- and so do the people on this team. **Second, we were persistent.** Times got hard. Election Night 2016 was particularly discouraging. But through it all, we persevered. We marched, knocked on doors, made phone calls, rallied our friends and neighbors, and spoke out on social media. **And third, we stuck together.** One special interest group or shady billionaire might be able to cut a huge check, but that will never be enough to drown out all of the voices on this team. What happened in Ohio this year is a blueprint for success -- not just for this state, but for the Democratic Party. Right now, our job is to build the foundation that will allow us to succeed again and again. [**November is coming to an end and we need to reach our $10,000 goal. Would you be able to give before Friday night?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd81/4462dc26/8ac84700/201f0dbf/4250117015/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181128?refcode=sbe181128_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude for your hard work, Sherrod
---

|
---

clean_body: | | | The 2018 campaign was never going to be an easy race. In 2016, Trump won Ohio by a wide margin. As 2018 rolled on, polling showed my opponent closing the gap. Special interests wanted me gone. My opponent launched some awful, nasty, personal attacks against me and my family. You know how we overcame all that? With messages like this one. The grassroots strength that carried us to victory in the 2018 election started way back in November of 2013, "" Month after month, quarter after quarter, year after year, we hit critical fundraising goals. We grew our team from a few thousand supporters to a powerful grassroots movement of hundreds of thousands. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Here's why that happened: First, because our values resonate with people. When you fight for the workers who built this country, people take notice. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, collect tips or collect a salary, I believe our country should reward hard work -- and so do the people on this team. Second, we were persistent. Times got hard. Election Night 2016 was particularly discouraging. But through it all, we persevered. We marched, knocked on doors, made phone calls, rallied our friends and neighbors, and spoke out on social media. And third, we stuck together. One special interest group or shady billionaire might be able to cut a huge check, but that will never be enough to drown out all of the voices on this team. What happened in Ohio this year is a blueprint for success -- not just for this state, but for the Democratic Party. Right now, our job is to build the foundation that will allow us to succeed again and again. "" With gratitude for your hard work, Sherrod | "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: General Motors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Folks:

**This week, General Motors announced they are halting production at five North American plants, including GM Lordstown in our district.**

GM is eliminating over 1,600 jobs in Lordstown as of March 2019, and approximately 14,000 jobs nationwide. This announcement comes after GM eliminated approximately 3,000 jobs at the Lordstown plant over the last two years.

**This is our generation's "Black Monday." I am heartbroken for the workers and their families -- and enraged at the heartlessness of GM and the short-sighted policymakers who got us here.**

For decades, workers have devoted their lives to produce some of the finest cars in the country for GM. We fought together to keep GM afloat and the American taxpayers bailed them out when they were on the verge of bankruptcy.

Thousands of families have sacrificed to build GM into what it is today. And in return, GM has turned its back on us when we need them the most.

This is a bad combination of greedy corporations and policymakers with no understanding of economic development. We joined with Republicans and Democrats to implore President Donald Trump to keep his word when he came to the Mahoning Valley last year and promised jobs were "all coming back. They're all coming back. Don't move. Don't sell your house." So far, President Trump has been asleep at the switch and he owes this community an explanation.

The Mahoning Valley and the whole Midwest has been yearning for the Trump Administration to come here, roll up their sleeves and help us fight for this recovery. What we've gotten instead are broken promises and petty tweets. Big corporations like General Motors and the President himself are the only ones who are benefiting from this economy -- an economy rigged against workers who are playing by the rules but still not getting ahead.

As always, my team and I are standing by to assist all those who are impacted by this closure. Our community has always banded together in difficult times, and this will be no different.

\-- Tim

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
If you'd no longer like to receive emails, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ff/5486deaa/242490b7/dcf60d7/3805692415/VEsH/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Friday's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Let's keep this momentum rolling.
|

---
Friend,

Our end-of-month deadline is fast approaching -- we have just over 48 hours to meet our goals before the deadline. Supporters like you did an amazing job over the last year -- each time we reached out, our grassroots supporters stepped up. Because of support from folks like you, we were able to break the supermajorities in BOTH the House and Senate. **Now we're trying to keep that momentum going and stand with Roy during this special session. Will you help us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before the end of the month?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203e43/2fde7c66/4825ad29/156864bb/1492850600/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov_eom1?refcode=20181127_em_nov_eom2_ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")
